faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Got questions about our ai baby dance video generator free tool? We've got answers for everything you need to know.

items.question: Is BabyBoogey's AI baby dance video generator really 100% free?
items.answer: Yes, you can start free. BabyBoogey offers signup credits for AI baby image trials and lets you preview dance templates with no credit card. Finished dance videos require enough credits, and any paid pack removes the watermark.

items.question: Do I need to create an account to make baby dance video free?
items.answer: A free account is needed before generation. Visit BabyBoogey, upload your baby's photo, choose a dance template, preview it, then buy credits when you are ready to generate the finished video.

items.question: Will there be a watermark on my free baby dance video?
items.answer: Any paid pack removes the BabyBoogey watermark. Free signup credits are for image trials and template previews, while finished dance videos require enough credits.

items.question: What photo formats work with the free AI baby video generator?
items.answer: We support JPG, PNG, and WebP formats. For the best results, use a clear, front-facing photo with good lighting. The minimum recommended size is 512x512 pixels, but most modern smartphone photos work perfectly right out of the camera.

items.question: How long does it take to generate a baby dance video for free?
items.answer: Most videos are ready usually in 45-180 seconds! Our AI is optimized for speed, so you can create and share baby dance videos almost after processing. No lengthy processing queues or waiting around — the free tier gets the same fast generation as paid plans.

items.question: Is it safe to upload my baby's photo to BabyBoogey?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your photos are processed securely using encrypted connections and are never shared with third parties. Since sign-in is required before generation, we collect minimal data about you. You can trust BabyBoogey with your family's precious moments.

items.question: Can I use the free baby dance video maker for adults or pets too?
items.answer: Yes! While BabyBoogey is optimized for baby photos, our AI face animation technology works great with any clear face photo — toddlers, kids, adults, and even pets with visible faces. Give it a try with the whole family and see who has the best dance moves!

items.question: What's the difference between the free tier and paid plans?
items.answer: The free stage gives you access to template previews and AI baby image trials. Paid packs unlock finished video generation, Pro templates, 720p / 1080p exports, and watermark-free downloads.
